title: Home - Brookefield Multi Speciality Hospital in Bangalore
heading: Advanced Restorative Neurosurgeon
description: Brookefield multi speciality hospital in Bangalore does more than just providing medical care. We are one of the top multi speciality hospitals in Bangalore.

Phone: +91 8880223344 | +91 8880910000 book appointment View this post on Instagram A post shared by Brookefield Hospital (@brookefield.hospital) Emergency Care 24/7 8880910000 A Transforming, Healing Presence. Brookefield Hospital is committed to doing more than just providing medical care. We aim at providing exceptional & accessible health care at optimal costs to every patient with the same dignity and respect. 122250+ patients 22+ Departments 40+ Doctors Super Speciality Medical Services Read more + Endocrinology & Diabetes Care Brookefield Hospital has a dedicated center for Diabetes Care & Education that takes a complete holistic view in detecting and managing the disease. Joint Replacement & Trauma Brookefield Hospital is equipped to treat all types of muscular, bone and skeletal problems ranging from Trauma Surgery to Minimally Invasive Arthroscopy Surgery. Women Health & Child Birth Brookefield Hospital ensures that child birth, delivery and infant care is convenient and comfortable. Gastroenterology & Laparoscopic Surgery Brookefield Hospital provides a complete range of diagnosis and treatment of gastrointestinal diseases. Neurology & Neurosurgery Brookefield Hospital has specialist doctors and technology available for diagnosis and treatment of all categories of disease involving the central, peripheral, and autonomic nervous systems. Cancer Care Facility Brookefield Hospital uses a multidisciplinary approach for the treatment of patients suffering from cancer. The cancer centre has the expertise to perform full range of cancer surgeries. Dialysis / Nephrology With our expert team of Nephrologists and state-of-the-art diagnostic and medical equipment, we provide treatment for simple to complex Nephrological Conditions. Dental Surgery & Cosmetic Dentistry Treatment available for complex Road traffic injuries of face, for cosmetic dentistry and dental implants , by a team of plastic surgeons and maxillofacial surgeons. Call Us: +91 8880910000 Brookefield Hospital About Us Book Appointment Our Vision Our Vision At Brookefield hospital, Our vision is to be recognized as a premiere healthcare organization and to be a preferred choice for patients, doctors and associated work force at local, regional and ultimately at the national level. Our Mission Unwavering and uncompromising commitment to achieving excellence in delivering quality and compassionate health care. We promise nothing but a memorable medical experience for our valued customers in all departments of health care. Our Mission Goals & Objectives Goals & Objectives To provide patient centered high quality service in an effective and efficient manner, with passion and compassion in a friendly, stimulating and professional environment Call Us: +91 8880910000 Brookefield Hospital Why Choose Us? Book Appointment Experienced & Expert Doctors It should be our first choice to consult with a Qualified and Experienced Doctor and our all doctors are experienced and highly qualified Great Infrastructure Brookefield Hospital - A Unit of Sanjeevini Healthcare Pvt Ltd, is a 100-bed multi-specialty hospital with state-of-the-art equipment, world-class infrastructure, and highly qualified specialist, doctors Emergency Services Brookefield Hospital is at your service 24/7. Our ambulance services, emergency care, and doctors are available round the clock. Monisha Consultant Anesthesiologist MBBS, MD (Anesthesiology) Why Patients Trust Us What Our Patients Say About Us I am writing this review on behalf of my elderly parents who had their first covid vaccine at Brookefield Hospital today. From registration to appointment scheduling to getting the shot administered the entire process was seamless. The care and attention they received was excellent.
The staff were friendly, courteous and very diligent about Covid-19 safety precautions. The facility is very well maintained,  easily accessible and handicap friendly.
My dad is a retired general surgeon. The respect, care and attention he received from Dr. Pradeep Kumar and his staff was genuinely extraordinary.
My parents were extremely pleased with their very first visit to Brookfield Hospital today and I wouldn't be surprised if they choose to transfer all their future medical care needs to this facility and it's doctors.
Of note, Dr Pradeep Kumar had done a stellar job in the battle against Covid-19 and we wish him and his team much success in the future. Kiran Kumar Date :9-03-2021 We are very happy that we had a fine reception and good treatment of
                        the doctors as well as the staff members, especially the services given by the nursing staff who
                        attended to the patient’s needs was happy very much in the recovery process by their timely
                        service and helpful talk at every crucial point. They have done as their duty but useful service
                        for which we are very thankful. My son Srinivas also tells me that the treatment and service by
                        doctors and staff were superb and praise worthy. We are thankful for all those and we also
                        appreciate the kindly approach and response of the Dr Director Sri Pradeep Kumar and the
                        associate doctors, as an attendant of the patient, I also experienced the good services of the
                        nursing staff Leela, Vidya and Sita. Pallavi Mishra Date: 28-02-2019 I found very nice facilities and very helpful staff in the hospital.
                        AC- Section delivery patient can stay here without a lady attendant. That is the very nice thing
                        that l never experienced in any other hospital such a nice nursing staff that Dr. Pradeep Kumar
                        has. Dr Sandhya Rani is very helping and friendly doctor. Good treatment .we are totally
                        satisfied. Roshni Date: 15-03-2019 Excellent hospital facilities well behaved staffs, this is the first
                        time I had been hospitalized in my 25 years. I had a nice experience in the hospital. Doctors
                        are visiting frequently that is a good thing. I would like to thank all the staff member. Manu Gupta Date: 3-03-2019 Good facilities with very good care for patients. Very prompt
                        treatment and first aid give with good sanitation. Overall quite satisfied with the treatment
                        and procedure followed in taking good care of the patients. Shravan Date: 7-03-2019 "We are happy with your concern. We like the way you treated. The
                        facility provided were good with a proper treatment. Thank you very much for your kind check up.
                        Thanks for all the colleagues (Brooke field hospital)" Keshav Date: 16-7-2018 Treatment has given to me was nice. How the doctors has been treated
                        me was good. It was nice treatment by the nurses. They had treated me in good manner. So, nice
                        it was treatment given to me. Vijay Shankar Date: 5-12-2018 Service was good, doctors are very patience to listen to patient.
                        Nurses were very helpful. Thanks to Dr. Pradeep Venkatesh Date: 21-9-2018 I am very happy with the treatment & Sisters also taking care very
                        well. I am very satisfied with their treatment, I hope I will get well soon. Sushila Date: 29-10-2018 I never seen this kind of hospitality. Service is very well. . Keep
                      it up. Thank you. Shweta Date: 24-02-2019 Your treatment is so good, and your sisters and brothers are treated
                        so well. I appreciate and your facilities are so well.
